name: Content & Copywriting
tagline: Words that rank, convert, and sound like your client wrote them.
description: Blog posts, landing pages, email sequences, and ad copy, SEO-informed and written to produce business outcomes. We match your client's voice so precisely they'll wonder if they wrote it themselves.

deliverables.title: Blog Posts & Articles
deliverables.description: Long-form, SEO-optimised content targeting high-intent keywords. Built to rank, educate, and convert.

deliverables.title: Landing Page Copy
deliverables.description: Conversion-focused page copy with a clear hierarchy: headline, benefit stack, objection handling, CTA.

deliverables.title: Email Sequences
deliverables.description: Welcome flows, nurture sequences, and promotional campaigns. Written to move subscribers toward a decision.

deliverables.title: Ad Copy
deliverables.description: Headlines, body copy, and CTAs for Google, Meta, and LinkedIn. Tested variants included.

deliverables.title: Website Copy
deliverables.description: Homepage, about, services, and contact pages, structured to guide visitors and convert browsers into enquiries.

deliverables.title: Brand Voice Matching
deliverables.description: We absorb your client's tone, vocabulary, and style before writing a single word. The output sounds like them, not us.

whyUs.title: SEO-informed from the start
whyUs.description: Every piece is written with keyword intent in mind. We don't retrofit SEO. It's built into the brief, the structure, and the copy.

whyUs.title: Voice matching that holds up
whyUs.description: We don't write generic content. We write in your client's voice. A discovery brief, a tone audit, and we match it close enough that your client reads it back to you.

whyUs.title: Fast turnaround, consistent quality
whyUs.description: Most deliverables turn around in 3–5 business days. Retainer partners get predictable delivery dates, every month, on time.

faq.question: How do you match the client's voice?
faq.answer: We start with a voice and tone brief: existing content samples, audience descriptions, and a short Q&A. The first deliverable includes a voice reference doc you can reuse across all future content.

faq.question: Do you include revisions?
faq.answer: Yes, two rounds of revisions are included on every piece. Additional rounds are available if needed. In practice, most clients pass on round two.

faq.question: Can this be combined with SEO?
faq.answer: It's the strongest combination. Content without SEO strategy targets the wrong terms. SEO without content can't rank. We'll surface that opportunity in the discovery call if it applies.

faq.question: What industries do you write for?
faq.answer: We work across the industries your clients serve: local services, e-commerce, SaaS, professional services, and more. The voice-matching process handles the niche specifics.
